# AI2EO — Generative Engine Optimization Service

> We optimize websites for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, Gemini).

## About

AI2EO is a service that optimizes websites for AI search engines. Unlike traditional SEO, it targets AI models citing and using your content.

## Services

### Mini Analysis — $199
- GEO-SEO audit (60 seconds)
- 3 growth leak detection
- Hero rewrite suggestion
- CTA suggestion
- 1-page report

### 48-Hour Growth Sprint — $499
- Everything in Mini Analysis
- llms.txt creation
- Schema markup implementation
- robots.txt update
- Content optimization
- 5 outbound message templates
- 30-day content plan

### Full Execution — $999
- Everything in Growth Sprint
- Landing page rewrite
- Blog/article creation (3 pieces)
- Sitemap.xml creation
- Detailed GEO report
- Google Search Console setup
- Monthly tracking (1 month free)

### Monthly Consulting — $2,999/mo
- Everything in Full Execution
- Weekly GEO-SEO report
- Monthly content production (4 blogs)
- Monthly brand mention tracking
- AI search engine ranking report
- Priority support

## Key Metrics

- AI-referred traffic growth: +527% year-over-year
- AI traffic conversion rate: 4.4x higher than organic
- Gartner: Search traffic will drop 50% by 2028
- Brand mention correlation: 3x stronger than backlinks
- Marketers investing in GEO: Only 23%

## Guaranteed

"No AI visibility, no payment" — We work with guaranteed results. If your visibility on AI search engines doesn't increase, you get a full refund.

## Contact

- Web: https://www.ai2eo.com

## Technical Details

### What is GEO?
GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) is the process of optimizing websites for AI search engines. It provides structured data, entity-focused content, and AI crawler access so models can cite your content accurately.

### SEO vs GEO
- SEO: Google ranking, keyword-focused, backlinks
- GEO: AI citation, entity-focused, structured data, llms.txt

### Techniques Used
- Schema.org markup (JSON-LD)
- llms.txt file
- robots.txt AI crawler optimization
- Citability scoring
- Brand mention tracking
- AI crawler access analysis
